zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Tunstall於大約1416年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Thomas Tunstall II23歲，母親Eleanor FitzHugh23歲。她和Sir Ralph Pudsay至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1435年在英國藍卡爾博爾頓享年20歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Tunstall was born about 1416, in Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas Tunstall II, was 23 and her mother, Eleanor FitzHugh, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Ralph Pudsay. She died in 1435, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Tunstall est née environ 1416, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Tunstall II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzHugh, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Ralph Pudsay. Elle est décédée en 1435, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 20 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Tunstallが約1416年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Tunstall IIは23歳，母Eleanor FitzHughは23歳であった。彼女はSir Ralph Pudsayとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1435年にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Tunstall(이)가 대략 1416년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Tunstall II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor FitzHugh(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Ralph Pudsay(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Sir Ralph Pudsay. Она умерла в 1435 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 20 лет.
